name: ExtensionClaim_Item_Detail_SubDetail_TraceNumber
title: R5: Number for tracking (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Claim.item.detail.subDetail.traceNumber` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Claim.item.detail.subDetail.traceNumber` 0..* `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Claim.item.detail.subDetail.traceNumber` 0..* `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Claim.item.detail.subDetail.traceNumber` has a context of Claim.item.detail.subDetail based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Claim`.
Element `Claim.item.detail.subDetail.traceNumber` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Trace number for tracking purposes. May be defined at the jurisdiction level or between trading partners.
